allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); client=d[''client''][0]; print\(''Package:'', client[''client_info''][''android_client_info''][''android_package_name'']\); certs=client.get\(''oauth_client'',[]\); print\(''SHA1 certs:'', [c.get\(''android_info'',{}\).get\(''certificate_hash'',''''\) for c in certs]\)")
